
EXAMPLES FOR CHAPTER 5 - "PostScript Language".

The examples for this chapter require 58 KB.
			
Files contained in this folder:				
	Manifest
	beach.ps
	binding1.ps
	binding2.ps (1)
	binding3.ps
	clrmark1.ps (2)
	clrmark2.ps (2)
	dictstk1.ps
	dictstk2.ps
	forall.ps
	forloop1.ps (2)
	forloop2.ps
	getintvl.ps
	hanoi.ps
	hello.ps
	honk.ps
	if.ps
	ifelse.ps (2)
	known1.ps
	known2.ps (3)
	names.ps
	octagon1.ps
	octagon2.ps
	parmesan.ps
	pop.ps (2)
	proc1.ps
	proc2.ps
	proc3.ps
	proc4.ps
	put.ps
	putintvl.ps
	reclaim1.ps
	reclaim2.ps
	repeat.ps (3)
	roll.ps (*) (2)
	shuimage.ps (*)
	trig.ps (2)
	weird.ps
	where.ps
	whilelp.ps (4)
	wines1.ps
	wines2.ps

(*)	Requires PostScript Level 2.

(1)	binding2.ps has an error in it. This is deliberate. Please refer to
	the appropriate section in the book for an explanation.
	
(2)	The listing in the book for these examples accidentally omitted
	the definition for the inch procedure. These examples were modified
	to contain that definition so they'd work.

(3)	known2.ps will give different results depending on the system.

(4)	The example listing in the book left out the showpage instruction
	at the end of the PostScript program. This instruction is included
	in these examples on this disk.
	
